04 Jun 2009 for information about spiceexplorer, please read (use your EECS Instructional account username/password to authenticate) (html version) https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst/pub/nis/?file=Synopsys/C-2009.03/c2009.03/sx_c2009_03/

09.03/sx_c2009_03/doc/manuals/sxcds.pdf SpiceExplorer is a Synopsys (http://www.synopsys.com) product. Troubleshooting --------------- Instructional Support Group inst@eecs.berkeley.edu (386 Cory, 333 Soda)
